'''Damara Decrilla''' was a [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] of [[House Mecetti]].

==Biography==
She has represented her house in the [[Vor-cal]] but was not particularly enthusiastic about it.<ref name="LOTE" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'' {{1stm}}
